name: myconversation
description: OpenClaw channel plugin scaffold for myconversation staff group chat.

myconversation.label: myconversation
myconversation.description: Connect OpenClaw to myconversation staff group chat over internal gRPC.

enabled.description: Enable or disable the myconversation channel account

tenantId.description: Tenant id sent as x-tenant-id on every RPC

token.description: Bearer token sent as Authorization on every RPC

userId.description: Optional service user id for plugin self/mention filtering (not sent on the wire)

username.description: Optional username for @mention text matching (without leading @)

activeGroupsPolicy.description: allowlist = only listed groups are active; all = all bot-member groups are active

groupPolicy.description: OpenClaw sender security for group messages (use open when filtering groups via activeGroupsPolicy)

groupAllowFrom.description: OpenClaw group sender allowlist when groupPolicy is allowlist

allowFrom.description: OpenClaw DM sender allowlist (unused for group-only channel)

groups.description: Per-group overrides keyed by chat group id

requireMention.description: Require mentioned_user_ids or @username before dispatching to OpenClaw

staticUrl.description: Optional public static host for inbound media reads (e.g. https://s.example.com)

mediaTempDir.description: Optional override for inbound media temp directory root
